vocab.meaning: nền tảng văn hóa / yếu tố cốt lõi của văn hóa
vocab.example: Football is widely regarded as a cultural cornerstone in my country, influencing everything from media to daily conversations.

vocab.meaning: sự nhiệt huyết/hào hứng vô song (không đối thủ)
vocab.example: The unrivaled fervor of the fans during the national championships creates an atmosphere that is almost palpable.

vocab.meaning: tinh thần đồng đội, tinh thần tập thể
vocab.example: Team sports are encouraged in schools specifically to instill a strong sense of esprit de corps among students from a young age.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở hạ tầng thể thao
vocab.example: The government has poured significant investment into sporting infrastructure to support the rising popularity of basketball.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua những rào cản xã hội
vocab.example: I believe team sports are popular because they have a unique ability to transcend social barriers and bring diverse people together.
The success of our national volleyball team has had a profound impact on how the youth perceive professional sports careers.

vocab.meaning: bản sắc tập thể / định sắc chung của cộng đồng
vocab.example: Supporting a local club often forms a major part of a person's collective identity in many urban areas.

vocab.meaning: nơi nuôi dưỡng / cái nôi sản sinh ra
vocab.example: School leagues act as a breeding ground for future professional athletes who will represent the nation.

vocab.meaning: tâm lý dân tộc / hệ tư tưởng chung của quốc gia
vocab.example: The desire for victory in team competitions is deeply woven into the national psyche.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy sự cạnh tranh lành mạnh
vocab.example: Team sports are viewed as a vital tool to foster healthy competition and discipline among the younger generation.
